word: H2567 - חָמַשׁ - châmash - khaw-mash' - Take up the fifth participle

sections.paragraph:
Original: חמשׁ

Transliteration: châmash

Phonetic: khaw-mash'

BDB Definition:

  1. to arrange in multiples of five, take one fifth
    1. (Piel) to take one fifth, tax a fifth of

Origin: a denominative from H2568

TWOT entry: TWOT- 686

Part(s) of speech: Verb
